hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */kubernetes/apps/*/ks.yaml|*/kubernetes/apps/*/kustomization.yaml) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Context reminder: if an app was added or removed, update .claude/context/02_apps_inventory.md"}}';;  */kubernetes/components/*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Context reminder: if a component changed, update .claude/context/06_components.md"}}';;  */docker/*/docker-compose.yaml) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Context reminder: if a docker service was added or removed, update .claude/context/08_docker_hosts.md"}}';; esac

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"KARPATHY CHECK (before every edit):
1. Think Before Coding: state assumptions; if unclear stop and ask
2. Simplicity First: minimum code to solve the problem; nothing speculative
3. Surgical Changes: touch only what you must; no adjacent cleanup
4. Goal-Driven: every changed line traces directly to the user request"}}'
